hooks.command: echo '[docs] Before modifying files: have you loaded vault context for this task? If not, invoke docs-context first.'

echo '[docs] Done checklist: (1) tests pass? (2) linting passes? (3) changes reviewed for quality + roadmap alignment? (4) inline docs updated? (5) docs:review completed? (6) claude-context.md updated? — If claiming work is complete, invoke superpowers:verification-before-completion first.'
